# Little Canary

> Prompt injection detection library for Python. Uses sacrificial LLM instances as behavioral probes — runs input against a sandboxed canary model and analyzes its response for signs of compromise. 99% detection on TensorTrust (400 attacks). Single dependency (requests). Apache 2.0.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/roli-lpci/little-canary/blob/main/README.md): Full documentation — quick start, API reference, deployment modes, benchmark results, integration examples, troubleshooting
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/roli-lpci/little-canary/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history and release notes
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/roli-lpci/little-canary/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute, development setup, PR guidelines

## API

- [Pipeline](https://github.com/roli-lpci/little-canary/blob/main/little_canary/pipeline.py): `SecurityPipeline` — main entry point. Three modes: block, advisory, full
- [Structural Filter](https://github.com/roli-lpci/little-canary/blob/main/little_canary/structural_filter.py): `StructuralFilter` — fast regex + encoded payload detection (base64, hex, ROT13, reverse)
- [Canary Probe](https://github.com/roli-lpci/little-canary/blob/main/little_canary/canary.py): `CanaryProbe` — sacrificial LLM instance that executes input in a sandbox
- [Analyzer](https://github.com/roli-lpci/little-canary/blob/main/little_canary/analyzer.py): `BehavioralAnalyzer` — analyzes canary response for behavioral anomalies
- [Judge](https://github.com/roli-lpci/little-canary/blob/main/little_canary/judge.py): `LLMJudge` — optional LLM-based verdict for ambiguous cases

## Examples

- [Chatbot Example](https://github.com/roli-lpci/little-canary/blob/main/examples/chatbot_example.py): Basic chatbot integration with advisory mode
- [Generic Example](https://github.com/roli-lpci/little-canary/blob/main/examples/generic_example.py): Minimal usage with custom Ollama endpoint

## Optional

- [Security Policy](https://github.com/roli-lpci/little-canary/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Vulnerability reporting process
- [Citation](https://github.com/roli-lpci/little-canary/blob/main/CITATION.cff): Academic citation metadata
- [Benchmarks](https://github.com/roli-lpci/little-canary/tree/main/benchmarks): TensorTrust red team runner, false positive tests, dashboard
